title: Poa banffiana
intro: Poa banffiana is a species of grass native to the Canadian Rockies, belonging to the genus Poa and family Poaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, possibly contributing to its traditional use in the treatment of various health conditions, such as arthritis and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Poa banffiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Poa banffiana has been used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often prepared to aid in the relief of pain, inflammation, and stress.

Poa banffiana is closely related to other species within the Poa genus.
